feedback.text: As an EU citizen, it is a great deal of concern to me that companies like MasterCard and Visa are so unheared trying to restrict access to content that they feel reprehensible. I had hoped for the EU and all its countries to take categorical action against censorship, but in the light of current events it seems that this is not the case. I want to be free to decide what content I want to interact financially with. As an EU citizen, I reject any form of censorship.
